summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.55), last_peak_position (r=+0.42), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=-0.34). LASSO-stable for views_public: traffic_algorithmic_pct. Top predictors of retention_30s: geo_asia_pct (r=-0.73), geo_us_pct (r=+0.72), traffic_subscriber_pct (r=+0.64). LASSO-stable for retention_30s: traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_search_pct. Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: ms_emotional_intensity_max_max (r=+0.48), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_max (r=+0.48), geo_eu_pct (r=+0.48).
